---
title: "{{VIGNETTE_TITLE}}"
author: "{{AUTHOR}}"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

> Vignette template — replace this block with a 1–2 sentence framing for non-technical readers.

## Finding

The headline result. Every number in the prose is pulled from the ledger and
cited by finding id — never hand-typed. The setup chunk loads the ledger once:

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import json

# The verified ledger. Pull every value you cite from here, so the document
# cannot drift from what validate.py replays. (Renders fine while empty.)
F = {f["id"]: f for f in json.load(open("../analysis/output/findings.json"))}
# value = F["F-001"]["value"]
```

Then state numbers via inline expressions (single braces when you use it — the
doubled braces here only keep the template itself from executing the example):

```markdown
The median rating is `{{python}} f"{value:.1f}"` [`F-001`].
```

## Context

What question this answers. Who's asking. Why now.

## Plot

```{python}
#| label: fig-headline
#| fig-cap: "Caption"
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Draw from the same table the finding replays against — a derived
# analysis/output/*.csv, or raw data with the DR-NNN filters from
# analysis/_decisions.py applied — so prose and figure cannot disagree.
# df = pd.read_csv("../analysis/output/...")
plt.figure()
plt.title("placeholder")
plt.show()
```

## Implications

What this means for the project's question. Tag claims:

- A measurable thing [`OBSERVED`]
- An informed inference [`PLAUSIBLE` — supporting pattern: ...]
- Anything you can't defend → rephrase or remove [no `WEAK` claims in published vignettes]

## Caveats

What this analysis does *not* support. Cross-reference `memory/data_quality_caveats.md`.

## Follow-up questions

What this raises. Add to `live-docs/ANALYSIS_BACKLOG.md` as `A-NNN` if worth pursuing.

## Reproducibility

This vignette's claims are backed by:

- {{F-NNN list}}
- Filters applied: {{DR-NNN list}}
- Run `python ../analysis/validate.py` to verify.
